recommendations.title: The Last Man on Earth
recommendations.overview: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

recommendations.title: The Colony
recommendations.overview: In the not-too-distant future: after a global catastrophe has wiped out nearly all of humanity on Earth, an elite astronaut from Space Colony Kepler must make a decision that will seal the fate of the people on both planets.

recommendations.title: Gattaca
recommendations.overview: Vincent is an all-too-human man who dares to defy a system obsessed with genetic perfection. He is an "In-Valid" who assumes the identity of a member of the genetic elite to pursue his goal of traveling into space with the Gattaca Aerospace Corporati

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
recommendations.overview: In the future, a strange fungus has changed nearly everyone into thoughtless, flesh-eating monsters. When a scientist and a teacher find a girl who seems to be immune to the fungus, they all begin a journey to save humanity.

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.

recommendations.title: Rakka
recommendations.overview: A story of broken humanity following the invasion of a technologically superior alien species. Bleak, harrowing, and unrelenting, the humans must find enough courage to go on fighting.

recommendations.title: Automata
recommendations.overview: Jacq Vaucan, an insurance agent of ROC robotics corporation, routinely investigates the case of manipulating a robot. What he discovers will have profound consequences for the future of humanity.

recommendations.title: Rubikon
recommendations.overview: The company soldier Hannah and the scientists Gavin and Dimitri are researching an algae project on board the Rubikon space station, which is supposed to permanently supply humanity with oxygen and food. But suddenly the earth disappears below them i
